Question: Sketch the graph of the parametric equations $$x = \sqrt{t} ,$$ $$y = 2 t + 3 ,$$ $$0 \le t \le 3.$$
Graph the parametric equations: $$x = 5 \cos{} t ,$$ $$y = 3 \sin{} t .$$
Sketch the graph of the parametric equations $$x = 2 \cos{} \theta \text{and} y = 4 \sin{} \theta ,$$ along with the rectangular equation on the same grid.
Answer: The graph of the parametric equations is in red and the graph of the rectangular equation is drawn in blue dots on top of the parametric equations.
